properties.mission: Protect FirstUK Bank through proactive risk identification and regulatory compliance
regulatory_responsibilities: Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) for high-risk customers

properties.regulatory_significance: Core regulatory responsibility mandated for the Risk & Compliance unit
Mandatory compliance requirement for standard customer verification

properties.definition: Intensive due diligence process applied to high-risk customers

properties.regulatory_significance: Mandatory reporting obligation to regulatory authorities
Core component of proactive risk identification

properties.rule_statement: Mandates customer identification procedures during onboarding
Establishes anti-money laundering controls and procedures
Defines operational risk management frameworks and controls
Governs data privacy and protection standards

properties.what_it_measures: Minimum investment amount triggering Board Technology Committee approval
properties.context: Governance framework for technology capital allocation

properties.rule_statement: Product launches require joint approval from the Board Risk Committee, Board, CRO, and Business Unit Head.
Policy changes require joint approval from the Compliance Committee, CRO, COO, and CEO.
Technology investments exceeding £500k require joint approval from the Board Technology Committee, Board, CTO, and CFO.
Pricing changes require joint approval from the Executive Committee, CEO, CFO, and Business Unit Head.
Risk exceptions require joint approval from the Risk Committee, CRO, and CEO.
Customer escalations are handled by Management via the Department Head and a defined Escalation Matrix.

properties.what_it_measures: Total number of physical branches in the network
Total employee count across all branches

rule_statement: Strategic decisions and escalations are governed by the Executive Committee

properties.rule_statement: The Board Risk Committee must convene meetings on a quarterly basis.

key_functions: documenting and maintaining organizational reporting relationships

properties.rule_statement: Clear single reporting line with dotted-line relationships for cross-functional collaboration.
properties.exception_process: Dotted-line relationships are explicitly permitted to facilitate cross-functional collaboration without violating the primary reporting line.

properties.what_it_measures: Total number of employees and contractors across all organizational units

what_it_measures: Total number of staff across the organization
